scope: PASS B expansion from the official FireHydrant API reference Markdown/OpenAPI fragments. JSON GET resource endpoints are streams; direct JSON/no-body POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE endpoints are write actions. SCIM provisioning, multipart/file payloads, exports, connectivity checks, side-effecting GET refresh, deprecated endpoints, and required-query mutations are explicitly excluded.

excluded.reason: Side-effecting refresh scheduler exposed as GET; not a read stream and not a JSON write action.
Endpoint uses multipart/form-data or file-like payloads that the JSON write dialect cannot represent.
Requires query parameters (dynamic_input_field_id) on a mutation; writes.json has no query-parameter dialect.
Export/download endpoint produces a file or asynchronous export artifact rather than a durable JSON resource stream.
